---
title: "Overview"
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: sentence
mainfont: Courier Prime
---

![](images/mccool_fm_logo.png){width=300px fig-align="center"}

The following website contains an assortment of curated documents from the radio station M^c^Cool FM and the mercenary group PUML.

Note the following symbols denote footnotes which are at the bottom of the page: *, ⁂, ◉, ♢, Δ, and then the greek alphabet starting with ^α^ and ending with ^ω^.
